note: Worldwide K-12 standards/curriculum framework catalog (incl. all 50 US states + DC). Source of truth for the standards menu AND the Supabase standards_frameworks seed. See docs/research-k12-standards-frameworks-2026-06-12.md (report) and docs/standards-catalog-schema-proposal.sql (DDL).

frameworks.name: Programmes d'enseignement + Socle commun de connaissances, de compétences et de culture
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose objectives per cycle per subject; socle commun = 5 domains. No alphanumeric IDs.
frameworks.current_version: Choc des savoirs wave (C1–C2 arrêté 22 Oct 2024; C3 arrêté 10 Apr 2025; C4 français/maths arrêté 18 Feb 2026)
frameworks.reform_status: Rolling implementation through 2028–29; socle commun revision in flight
frameworks.licence: Licence Ouverte / Etalab 2.0 (data.gouv.fr); arrêtés are public legal texts
frameworks.catalog_notes: Same programmes used by the 580-school AEFE network worldwide. Verify whether 2025–26 reform texts have reached data.gouv.fr.

frameworks.name: KMK Bildungsstandards (+ per-Land Lehrpläne)
frameworks.authority: Kultusministerkonferenz (KMK); 16 Länder ministries for operative Lehrpläne
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose Kompetenzbereiche/Kompetenzen; no ID system. Länder Lehrpläne also prose (Kompetenzerwartungen).
frameworks.reform_status: Teacher-education standards review piloting; results expected 2026
frameworks.licence: No open licence confirmed at KMK or any sampled Land
frameworks.catalog_notes: No single national curriculum — 16 Länder Lehrpläne (e.g. NRW Lehrplannavigator, Bavaria LehrplanPLUS, Berlin-Brandenburg RLP 1–10). Highest ingestion friction in Western Europe.

frameworks.name: Currículo LOMLOE (enseñanzas mínimas)
frameworks.authority: Ministerio de Educación, FP y Deportes; 17 comunidades autónomas develop regional curricula
frameworks.coding_scheme: 8 coded key competencies (CCL, CP, STEM, CD, CPSAA, CC, CE, CCEC) with coded descriptors (CCL1…); subject objectives via decree article/annex numbering
frameworks.licence: BOE open-data reuse conditions (commercial OK with attribution; RD 806/2018)
frameworks.catalog_notes: BOE API serves full consolidated decree text (objectives embedded in annexes). Regional (CCAA) decrees need per-community licence checks.

frameworks.name: Indicazioni nazionali per il curricolo (primo ciclo) + Indicazioni per i licei / Linee guida tecnici-professionali
frameworks.grade_range: Infanzia (3–6), primaria 1–5, secondaria I grado 6–8, secondaria II grado 9–13
frameworks.coding_scheme: Traguardi per lo sviluppo delle competenze (end-of-stage) + obiettivi di apprendimento — prose, no codes
frameworks.current_version: Primo ciclo: D.M. 221 of 9 Dec 2025 (in force 11 Feb 2026; rollout 2026/27→2030/31). Licei: new Indicazioni in consultation Apr 2026
frameworks.reform_status: Primo ciclo rollout from 2026/27; licei text not yet adopted
frameworks.licence: Gazzetta Ufficiale legal texts freely reproducible; CAD 'open by default' principle; no explicit licence statement

frameworks.name: Kerndoelen (PO + onderbouw VO) / Eindtermen & examenprogramma's (bovenbouw)
frameworks.grade_range: PO grades 1–8 (ages 4–12); onderbouw VO 7–9; bovenbouw havo/vwo/vmbo
frameworks.coding_scheme: Consecutively numbered kerndoelen (current set KD 1–58 in 7 areas; new set = 9 areas, doorgenummerd) — numbered prose, not hierarchical codes
frameworks.current_version: 2006 set in force; actualisatie: Dutch+Maths expected legally in force 1 Aug 2026, remaining areas Aug 2027
frameworks.reform_status: First full revision since 2006 landing 2026–27
frameworks.licence: CC BY 4.0 (SLO Curriculum Database on data.overheid.nl)
frameworks.catalog_notes: Most LMS-friendly in continental Europe: CC-BY + live JSON API (2006 set confirmed; new-set API status unverified).

frameworks.name: Podstawa programowa kształcenia ogólnego
frameworks.coding_scheme: Wymagania szczegółowe numbered Roman-domain + Arabic-item per subject (hybrid numbered prose, addressable within subject)
frameworks.current_version: 2017 base; 2024 slimmed version; NEW podstawa for preschool+primary Dz.U. 2026 poz. 378 (signed 11 Mar 2026), effective 1 Sept 2026 grades 1+4, phased to 2032 ('Reforma26 — Kompas Jutra')
frameworks.reform_status: Reforma26 rollout from Sept 2026; new structure ≤8 objective elements per subject
frameworks.licence: Statutory texts public domain (Open Data Act 2021); ZPE platform content CC

frameworks.name: Lehrplan 21
frameworks.coding_scheme: Fully coded competences: Subject.Area.Aspect.Level.Sub — e.g. MA.1.A.3.c. One of Europe's most granular systems
frameworks.catalog_notes: Per-canton adapted versions (zh.lehrplan.ch etc.). API exists but is access-controlled.

frameworks.name: Plan d'études romand (PER)
frameworks.grade_range: 3 cycles, grades 1–11; French-speaking cantons (incl. bilingual BE/FR/VS)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Domain numbering (e.g. L1 21–22) + attentes fondamentales at cycle ends; less granular than LP21

frameworks.name: Piano di studio della scuola dell'obbligo ticinese
frameworks.coding_scheme: Competency prose, HarmoS-aligned

frameworks.name: Perusopetuksen opetussuunnitelman perusteet 2014 (National Core Curriculum for Basic Education)
frameworks.authority: Opetushallitus (Finnish National Agency for Education, OPH/EDUFI)
frameworks.grade_range: Grades 1–9 (ages 7–16); separate pre-primary + LOPS 2021 upper secondary
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose objectives T1…Tn per subject per grade band + 7 transversal competences (L1–L7) — numbered in-document, not designed as tagging codes
frameworks.reform_status: Next full POPS revision expected post-2026; English-language LOPS from Aug 2026 (upper secondary)
frameworks.licence: State publication; ePerusteet API public (no auth); formal content licence unverified — confirm with OPH
frameworks.catalog_notes: Open-source platform (github.com/Opetushallitus/eperusteet); practically open, formally unverified.

frameworks.name: Läroplan för grundskolan, förskoleklassen och fritidshemmet (Lgr22)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Kursplaner: Syfte + Centralt innehåll per band (1–3, 4–6, 7–9) + betygskriterier at grades 3/6/9 — prose
frameworks.licence: CC0 (Syllabus API data) — most permissive in Europe

frameworks.name: Læreplanverket for Kunnskapsløftet 2020 (LK20 / Fagfornyelsen)
frameworks.grade_range: Grades 1–10 + upper secondary (Vg1–Vg3); aims after years 2/4/7/10/Vg-levels
frameworks.coding_scheme: Subject codes (NOR01-07, MAT01-05 = subject+seq-version) + per-aim Grep codes in the data layer (e.g. K1663); prose on site
frameworks.reform_status: Next structural reform consultation from Spring 2026; LK20 stays in force
frameworks.licence: NLOD 2.0 (Norwegian Licence for Open Government Data) — commercial reuse with attribution
frameworks.catalog_notes: Best curriculum API in Europe (REST needs API key: teknisk.grep@udir.no; SPARQL endpoint; daily updates; multilingual incl. English/Sámi).

frameworks.name: Fælles Mål
frameworks.coding_scheme: Hierarchy: fagformål → 215 binding kompetencemål → 866 advisory areas → 3,170 advisory goals (prose, no public codes)
frameworks.current_version: BEK 1715/2024; mid-tier goals advisory since 1 Jan 2025
frameworks.reform_status: REPLACEMENT in flight: simplified 'fagplaner' piloting 2025–26, in force 2027–28 — time any ingestion accordingly
frameworks.licence: Public legal text (retsinformation.dk); no explicit open licence

frameworks.name: Lehrpläne ('Lehrpläne NEU' 2023)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose competency-oriented; digi.komp digital strand
frameworks.current_version: BGBl. II Nr. 1/2023, rolling from Sept 2023
frameworks.reform_status: AHS-Oberstufe reform planned 2027–28
frameworks.licence: Public-sector documents; no explicit open licence

frameworks.name: Onderwijsdoelen / Minimumdoelen (Flemish Community)
frameworks.authority: Flemish Parliament / Departement Onderwijs en Vorming
frameworks.coding_scheme: Structured/numbered minimum goals on onderwijsdoelen.be; school networks write own leerplannen on top
frameworks.current_version: Replacement of court-annulled eindtermen (2022); new primary+pre-primary minimum goals approved 2025, phasing 2025–2026
frameworks.reform_status: Primary mandatory ~Sept 2026 (exact year unverified); secondary rolled from 2023–24

frameworks.name: Référentiels du Tronc Commun (Fédération Wallonie-Bruxelles)
frameworks.authority: FWB Ministry / Pacte pour un Enseignement d'Excellence
frameworks.grade_range: Tronc commun ages ~2.5–15; 9 référentiels; rollout P1–P2 2022/23 → S3 2028/29
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose competency statements by domain (replaces Socles de compétences)
frameworks.reform_status: CEB 2026 first exam on new référentiels; secondary phasing to 2028/29

frameworks.name: Aprendizagens Essenciais + Perfil dos Alunos (PASEO)
frameworks.coding_scheme: ~70+ AE documents (subject × year): knowledge/capacities/attitudes prose structured around PASEO competency areas
frameworks.current_version: PASEO 2017; AE 2018; maths secondary revised 2024/25–2025/26; citizenship AE Sept 2025
frameworks.catalog_notes: NC clause blocks commercial ingestion without DGE permission.

frameworks.name: Νέα Προγράμματα Σπουδών (New Study Programmes)
frameworks.authority: Institute of Educational Policy (IEP) / Ministry of Education
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose expected learning outcomes
frameworks.current_version: Universal from 2023/24 (primary+lower secondary); C' Lykeio completes 2025/26

frameworks.name: Rámcové vzdělávací programy (RVP PV/ZV/G/SOV)
frameworks.coding_scheme: 8 key competencies + očekávané výstupy (expected outcomes) at grades 3/5/9 — prose, portal-indexed
frameworks.current_version: Revised RVP ZV + PV approved 30 Dec 2024 (largest reform in 20 years)
frameworks.reform_status: PV mandatory Sept 2026; ZV mandatory grades 1+6 Sept 2027, all grades by 2031

frameworks.name: Štátny vzdelávací program (ŠVP)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose; schools write own ŠkVP on top
frameworks.current_version: New ŠVP for basic education 2023; piloted 2023–25
frameworks.reform_status: Mandatory from 2026/27 (grade 1)

frameworks.name: Nemzeti alaptanterv (NAT 2020) + kerettantervek
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose; NAT (strategic) → kerettantervek (subject) → helyi tanterv (school)
frameworks.reform_status: NAT evaluation/consultations open to early 2026; no revision announced

frameworks.name: Curriculum național (planuri-cadru + programe școlare)
frameworks.authority: Ministerul Educației (+ ROCNEE); RECRED reform project 2024–2028
frameworks.coding_scheme: Competențe specifice numbered per subject per year (e.g. 1.1, 2.3) + conținuturi
frameworks.current_version: Primary/lower-secondary from 2012/13; liceu overhaul via MO 4350/2025 + MO 6930/2025 (330 new programmes)
frameworks.reform_status: New liceu plans from grade 9 in 2026/27 — first upper-secondary overhaul in ~20 years

frameworks.name: Държавни образователни стандарти + учебни програми
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose expected results per subject/grade
frameworks.current_version: 2015–16 DOS under 2016 Act; curriculum-reform concept + 16 subject concepts in consultation 2025
frameworks.reform_status: Action Plan 2025–2027; integrated-task exams gr.7/10 from 2026; BG hours +12%, maths +25%

frameworks.name: Nacionalni kurikulum + predmetni kurikulumi ('Škola za život')
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Science, Education and Youth (MZOM); AZOO
frameworks.coding_scheme: Odgojno-obrazovni ishodi (outcomes) prose by grade
frameworks.reform_status: 147 new vocational curricula 2024–25; AI curriculum grades 5–6 from 2025/26

frameworks.name: Učni načrti (Kurikularna prenova 2022–2026)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose cilji + outcomes; 5 cross-cutting areas added 2025
frameworks.current_version: Updated učni načrti adopted May–Nov 2025 (41 basic + 88 + 52 + 19 subject curricula); in force 2025/26

frameworks.name: Planovi i programi nastave i učenja
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose ishodi (outcomes) tabled by grade; Dec 2024 bylaws define 3-level achievement standards
frameworks.current_version: Outcomes-based rollout since 2018/19; standards bylaws Dec 2024
frameworks.licence: Official Gazette texts; open in practice

frameworks.name: Nastavni planovi i programi (12 authorities)
frameworks.authority: RS entity ministry + 10 FBiH cantonal ministries + Brčko District; APOSO coordinates state-level
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose; varies per authority; APOSO Common Core Curriculum incomplete
frameworks.catalog_notes: Most fragmented system in Europe — 12 curriculum authorities.

frameworks.name: Наставни програми (Bureau for Development of Education)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education and Science; BDE (bro.gov.mk)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose; published in 5 languages
frameworks.current_version: New Concept rollout: grade 7 curricula 2025/26, grade 8 2026/27; subjects re-separated 2024

frameworks.name: Korniza Kurrikulare e Arsimit Parauniversitar + Kurrikula Bërthamë
frameworks.coding_scheme: 6–7 key competencies + subject competencies, prose

frameworks.name: Põhikooli + Gümnaasiumi riiklik õppekava
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education and Research; HARNO (oppekava.ee)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose outcomes by subject + school stage; 8 general competencies
frameworks.current_version: Updated March 2023; school alignment by Sept 2024
frameworks.reform_status: Estonian-medium transition through 2030; Strategy 2035 umbrella

frameworks.name: Skola2030 competency-based curriculum (state standards)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Sasniedzamie rezultāti (achievable results) per area/band, prose
frameworks.reform_status: Latvian-only instruction completes 2025/26; digitalization project to 2029

frameworks.name: Bendrosios programos (General Programmes)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Pasiekimai (achievements) by subject/band; some coded outcome references
frameworks.current_version: Order V-1269 of 24 Aug 2022 (~44–50 programmes); all grades by 2024–25

frameworks.name: Aðalnámskrá grunnskóla (National Curriculum Guide)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education and Children's Affairs
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose competence criteria with A–D descriptors
frameworks.current_version: 2011 general + 2013 subjects; 2023 amendment; rolling subject updates (2024 chapters)

frameworks.name: Plan d'études (enseignement fondamental)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Competency-based by cycle; 5 key competencies in new plan
frameworks.current_version: New plan unveiled 6 Feb 2026; cycles 1–2 from Sept 2026, cycles 3–4 Sept 2027 (replaces 2011 plan)
frameworks.catalog_notes: plandetudes.lu public platform launches Sept 2026 (4 languages).

frameworks.name: National Curriculum Framework (2012) + Learning Outcomes Framework (LOF)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Learning outcomes per area/year (LOF); prose
frameworks.current_version: NCF 2012; LOF rollout completed Year 11 in 2025/26; NCF review board since 2022

frameworks.name: Αναλυτικά Προγράμματα (Analytical Programmes)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education, Sport and Youth (MOEC)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose + δείκτες επιτυχίας/επάρκειας (success/sufficiency indicators — semi-structured)
frameworks.current_version: 2010/11 base; Phase 1 update completed 2024; Phase 2 targeted Sept 2025 (completion unverified)

frameworks.name: Державний стандарт загальної середньої освіти (NUS — New Ukrainian School)
frameworks.authority: Cabinet of Ministers / Ministry of Education and Science (МОН)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Competency-based; mandatory outcomes per educational area; 9 key competencies — prose
frameworks.current_version: Profile-secondary standard Resolution No. 851 (25 Jul 2024); 'Education for Life' frameworks Sept 2025
frameworks.reform_status: Academic-lyceum pilots 2025–26; national rollout 2027–28; reform continuing despite war
frameworks.licence: Cabinet resolutions on zakon.rada.gov.ua; no open licence

frameworks.name: Curriculum Național (+ Cadrul de Referință 2025)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Unități de competență (competency units) — tiered prose
frameworks.current_version: Current curriculum + Cadrul de Referință al Curriculumului Național 2025 adopted
frameworks.reform_status: Full redesign: pilots 2026/27, nationwide 2027/28 (OECD/UNICEF-supported, EU-accession aligned)

frameworks.name: Öğretim Programları — Türkiye Yüzyılı Maarif Modeli (TYMM)
frameworks.authority: Millî Eğitim Bakanlığı (MEB) / Talim ve Terbiye Kurulu
frameworks.coding_scheme: Kazanımlar (outcomes) numbered within units/themes; no global cross-subject codes confirmed
frameworks.current_version: TYMM approved 27 May 2024; phased from Sept 2024 (grades 1/5/9), rollout through ~2027
frameworks.licence: Government publication; free PDFs; no open licence
frameworks.catalog_notes: Europe-adjacent; 35% content reduction; values framework.

frameworks.name: ФГОС (Federal State Educational Standards) + ФОП (Federal Basic Educational Programmes)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Enlightenment of the Russian Federation
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose planned results per subject; ФОП adds detailed content + hour allocations (centralized 2023)
frameworks.current_version: 3rd-gen FGOS (Orders 286/287 of 2021, in force 2022–23); ФОП mandatory Sept 2023; updated secondary FGOS in force Sept 2027
frameworks.catalog_notes: Europe-adjacent.

frameworks.name: Korniza Kurrikulare e Kosovës (Kosovo Curriculum Framework)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Essential Learning Outcomes (ELOs) by key stage; 6 key competencies — prose

frameworks.name: Nastavni planovi i programi (Montenegro)
frameworks.authority: Zavod za školstvo + Ministry of Education, Science and Innovation
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose subject programmes; EU Key Competences alignment
frameworks.current_version: Education Reform Strategy 2025–2035 adopted; semester system from 2024

frameworks.name: Qatar National Curriculum Standards (QNCF)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education and Higher Education (MOEHE)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Standards-table format (English standards CEFR-aligned, exit B2 at grade 12); coding structure unverified
frameworks.current_version: National Education Strategy 2024–2030 ('Igniting the Spark of Learning'); English standards doc 2018
frameworks.licence: Qatar government ©; no open licence — MOEHE permission needed
frameworks.catalog_notes: FIRST-DEPLOYMENT MARKET. All private/international schools + KGs must teach: Arabic (all students), Islamic education (Muslim students), Qatar history (all students) — MOEHE-approved assessments required; teacher competency assessed from 2025–26. Documents primarily Arabic.

frameworks.name: UAE National Curriculum (mandatory-subjects overlay for private schools)
frameworks.authority: UAE Ministry of Education; regulators KHDA (Dubai), ADEK (Abu Dhabi), SPEA (Sharjah)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Standards tables; no confirmed code system
frameworks.current_version: 2025–26: increased Islamic education/Arabic/Social Studies allocations in private schools
frameworks.catalog_notes: All private schools regardless of curriculum must teach Arabic (all), Islamic education (Muslim students), Social/UAE Studies + Moral Education (all).

frameworks.name: Saudi National Curriculum
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose goals
frameworks.current_version: Vision 2030 reform wave (21st-century skills, computational thinking)

frameworks.name: National Curriculum of Kuwait
frameworks.catalog_notes: Private schools must teach Arabic, Islamic studies, Kuwait social studies.

frameworks.name: Oman National Curriculum
frameworks.current_version: 2024 restructuring of grades 1–4; Cambridge maths/science integration; Vision 2040

frameworks.name: Jordan National Curriculum Framework
frameworks.coding_scheme: 2024 English K–12 standards framework uses performance indicators (CEFR-aligned)

frameworks.name: Egypt Education 2.0 curriculum (+ Egyptian Knowledge Bank)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education and Technical Education (MoETE)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Competency/skills prose; rolled out grade-by-grade since 2018

frameworks.name: Lebanese National Curriculum (CERD/CRDP)
frameworks.authority: Centre for Educational Research and Development (CRDP) under MEHE
frameworks.current_version: 2000 curriculum; 2022 reform framework adopted (implementation disrupted by crises)

frameworks.name: Singapore MOE Syllabuses (+ SEAB exam syllabuses)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education (Singapore); SEAB co-badged with Cambridge
frameworks.grade_range: Primary P1–P6; Secondary S1–S5 (Full Subject-Based Banding, Posting Groups 1–3, from 2024); JC/Pre-U
frameworks.coding_scheme: 4-digit SEAB syllabus codes (1184 English, 4052 Maths) identify subject-level combos, NOT individual standards; outcomes prose by topic/strand

frameworks.name: NCF-SE 2023 (National Curriculum Framework for School Education) / NCERT
frameworks.authority: NCERT under Ministry of Education (NEP 2020); boards: CBSE, CISCE, 30+ state boards
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose learning outcomes; CBSE Competency-Based Education framework separate
frameworks.current_version: NCF-SE Aug 2023; NCERT textbooks transitioning through 2026–27; CISCE NEP reforms from 2025–26
frameworks.licence: Government of India publication; no open licence confirmed
frameworks.catalog_notes: Board landscape: CBSE (~25k+ schools, NCERT-aligned), CISCE (ICSE/ISC), state boards, IB/Cambridge internationals.

frameworks.name: Compulsory Education Curriculum Program and Standards (2022 edition)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education of the PRC
frameworks.coding_scheme: 学业质量标准 (academic quality standards) per grade band by core concept/domain — no compact codes

frameworks.name: 学習指導要領 Courses of Study (MEXT)
frameworks.grade_range: Elementary 1–6 (2017 rev., impl. 2020), Lower Sec 7–9 (2021), Upper Sec 10–12 (2022–24)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Outline-numbered content items ((1)(ア)) — not searchable IDs

frameworks.name: 2022 개정 교육과정 (2022 Revised National Curriculum)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Education (Korea) + KICE; NCIC portal
frameworks.coding_scheme: 성취기준 achievement standards coded e.g. [4국01-01] = grade band + subject + domain + sequence (granular, BNCC-like)

frameworks.name: Hong Kong Curriculum Guides (8 Key Learning Areas)
frameworks.current_version: PECG 2024; Primary Science + Primary Humanities mandatory from 2025/26 (all levels by 2027/28)

frameworks.name: 108 Curriculum (12-Year Basic Education Guidelines)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Competency indicators coded by learning stage within subject guidelines (structure unverified)

frameworks.name: MATATAG Curriculum (Revised K to 10)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Predecessor K-12 used coded MELCs; MATATAG coding scheme unverified

frameworks.name: Kurikulum Merdeka
frameworks.grade_range: PAUD, SD 1–6, SMP 7–9, SMA/SMK 10–12; full compliance 2026/27 (remote 2027/28)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Capaian Pembelajaran (learning achievements) by subject + PHASE (not year); Profil Pelajar Pancasila 6 dimensions

frameworks.name: KSSR + KSSM (Primary/Secondary School Standard Curriculum)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Standard Pembelajaran in decimal outline (1.1.1) — structured but not compact codes

frameworks.name: Basic Education Core Curriculum B.E. 2551 (2008)
frameworks.coding_scheme: ตัวชี้วัด indicators numbered per subject/strand/grade (decimal outline)
frameworks.reform_status: Competency-based replacement drafted 2022, not adopted; overhaul in motion

frameworks.name: Chương trình Giáo dục phổ thông 2018
frameworks.grade_range: Grades 1–9 basic + 10–12 orientation; all grades implemented by 2024–25
frameworks.coding_scheme: Yêu cầu cần đạt (required achievements) numbered in documents

frameworks.name: National Curriculum of Pakistan (Single National Curriculum)
frameworks.authority: Ministry of Federal Education / National Curriculum Council
frameworks.coding_scheme: Student Learning Outcomes (SLOs) numbered per subject/grade
frameworks.catalog_notes: Sindh rejected the SNC (18th Amendment devolution); other provinces adopted.

frameworks.name: Curriculum and Assessment Policy Statement (CAPS)
frameworks.grade_range: Grades R–12: Foundation R–3, Intermediate 4–6, Senior 7–9, FET 10–12
frameworks.coding_scheme: Topics per term per grade with weighting tables — prose, no codes; ~70+ subject documents
frameworks.current_version: 2012–14 rollout; ongoing per-subject amendments (CAT/IT 2024; SASL added)
frameworks.licence: © DBE; educational reproduction permitted; commercial unverified

frameworks.name: Competency-Based Curriculum / Education (CBC/CBE)
frameworks.grade_range: PP1–PP2, 1–6, Junior Sec 7–9, Senior Sec 10–12 (pioneer cohort grade 10 Jan 2026)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Strand/sub-strand outcomes, prose
frameworks.current_version: From 2018; 2024 rationalization (PWPER); first KJSEA exam Oct 2025

frameworks.name: NERDC Basic + Senior Secondary Curriculum
frameworks.authority: Nigerian Educational Research and Development Council
frameworks.coding_scheme: Performance objectives per topic/term/grade
frameworks.catalog_notes: Minimum standard for ALL Nigerian schools incl. private.

frameworks.name: Standards-Based Curriculum (2019) + Common Core Programme
frameworks.grade_range: KG–B6 (2019); B7–9 CCP (2021+); SHS in development (English Nov 2024)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Strand → sub-strand → content standard → indicator with decimal numbering

frameworks.name: Base Nacional Comum Curricular (BNCC)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Coded habilidades: EF05MA01 = stage EF + year 05 + subject MA + seq 01 (multi-year EF69LP01; EM13CO01). Subject codes LP/MA/CI/GE/HI/AR/EF/ER. ~600 skills in EF
frameworks.licence: Government publication (Lei 9.610/98 state-works doctrine suggests free use); explicit commercial licence unverified
frameworks.catalog_notes: Download portal historically offered structured skill matrix (503 at fetch; verify).

frameworks.name: Bases Curriculares + Planes y Programas de Estudio
frameworks.authority: MINEDUC / Unidad de Currículum y Evaluación (Chile)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Objetivos de Aprendizaje coded e.g. TE01 OA 05 (subject + grade + OA + number)
frameworks.current_version: Bases 2012/2013–15/2019; 1°–10° update consulted 2023–24, NOT yet decreed (CNED approval pending)
frameworks.reform_status: New bases awaiting decree; PADIC implementation plan

frameworks.name: Plan de Estudios 2022 (Nueva Escuela Mexicana)
frameworks.coding_scheme: 4 formative fields replace subjects + 7 transversal axes; 'learning situations' prose

frameworks.name: Núcleos de Aprendizajes Prioritarios (NAP)
frameworks.authority: Ministerio de Educación + Consejo Federal de Educación (Argentina)
frameworks.grade_range: Initial, Primary (2 cycles), Secondary — national floors; provinces extend

frameworks.name: Estándares Básicos de Competencias (EBC) + Derechos Básicos de Aprendizaje (DBA)
frameworks.grade_range: EBC by bands (1–3, 4–5, 6–7, 8–9, 10–11); DBA per grade 1–11
frameworks.coding_scheme: DBA numbered per grade + subject (no alphanumeric codes)

frameworks.name: Currículo Nacional de la Educación Básica (CNEB)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Exit profile → 31 competencies → capacidades → band standards → performance criteria (prose)

frameworks.name: Currículo Nacional (Ecuador)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Destrezas con criterio de desempeño coded (e.g. CN.1.1.1 pattern; unverified)

frameworks.name: National Curriculum in England
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose programmes of study per subject per key stage; no statement-level codes
frameworks.reform_status: Revised NC due spring 2027, first teaching Sept 2028 (Curriculum & Assessment Review, Nov 2025); a machine-readable version announced for the revised curriculum
frameworks.catalog_notes: KS4/KS5 de-facto objectives = exam-board specifications (AQA, OCR, Pearson Edexcel, WJEC/Eduqas) — Ofqual-regulated, separately copyrighted.

frameworks.name: Curriculum for Excellence (Experiences & Outcomes + Benchmarks)
frameworks.grade_range: Levels: Early/First/Second (primary), Third/Fourth (S1–S3), Senior Phase (S4–S6, National Qualifications)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Es&Os coded: [area][level]-[seq][sub] — e.g. MNU 2-03a (areas: MNU, ENG, SCI, SOC, TCH, HWB, EXA, RME, MFL)
frameworks.licence: Education Scotland website default OGL (Crown ©); PDF-level OGL coverage unverified

frameworks.name: Curriculum for Wales
frameworks.grade_range: Progression Steps 1–5 (ages ~5–16); 6 Areas of Learning and Experience
frameworks.coding_scheme: 27 Statements of What Matters + Descriptions of Learning per progression step — prose
frameworks.licence: GOV.WALES policy = OGL v3 (page-level declaration unverified)

frameworks.name: Northern Ireland Curriculum
frameworks.coding_scheme: Prose statutory requirements per Area of Learning
frameworks.licence: CCEA terms PROHIBIT commercial use of site content; DENI-document licence status unverified

frameworks.name: Ireland: Primary Curriculum Framework + Junior/Senior Cycle (NCCA)
frameworks.authority: National Council for Curriculum and Assessment (NCCA)
frameworks.grade_range: Primary (Junior Infants–6th Class); Junior Cycle (3yr); Senior Cycle (Leaving Cert)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Numbered learning outcomes within subject specifications; 24 Statements of Learning (JC); no cross-curriculum codes
frameworks.licence: NCCA copyright = personal use only; commercial redistribution requires permission

frameworks.name: Australian Curriculum v9.0
frameworks.coding_scheme: Content descriptions coded AC9M5N01 = AC9 + learning area (M) + year (5) + strand (N) + seq (01); achievement standards per year level
frameworks.licence: CC BY 4.0 (most content; Literacy/Numeracy Progressions CC BY-NC; media excluded)
frameworks.catalog_notes: Gold standard for ingestion: coded + CC-BY + machine-readable (RDF/XML, JSON-LD, SPARQL). VERIFIED 3/3.

frameworks.name: NSW Syllabuses (NESA)
frameworks.coding_scheme: NSW outcome codes (e.g. MA5-1WM pattern; post-2022 formats vary by syllabus)

frameworks.name: Victorian Curriculum F–10 Version 2.0
frameworks.coding_scheme: Victorian content descriptions + achievement standards (AC9-derived)
frameworks.current_version: v2.0 (Jun 2024); English/Maths full 2026, other areas through 2027

frameworks.name: New Zealand Curriculum / Te Mātaiaho (+ Te Marautanga o Aotearoa)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Poutama progressions, phases, prose objectives; NCEA achievement standards (NZQA) for senior
frameworks.current_version: Te Mātaiaho refresh: English + Maths mandatory Term 1 2026; Science/Social Sciences/HPE + Y9–10 2027; Arts/Tech/Languages 2028; Y11–13 2028–2030; final gazetted version mid-2026
frameworks.licence: CC BY-NC 4.0 New Zealand (education.govt.nz) — NON-COMMERCIAL; gazetted-document licence unverified
frameworks.catalog_notes: Commercial LMS needs Ministry permission. TMoA = parallel Māori-medium curriculum (not a translation).

frameworks.name: The Ontario Curriculum
frameworks.coding_scheme: Overall Expectations (B1) + Specific Expectations (B1.1); strand letters per subject; 5-char secondary course codes (MTH1W)
frameworks.licence: Crown © (King's Printer for Ontario); non-commercial with credit; commercial needs permission

frameworks.name: British Columbia Curriculum (Know-Do-Understand)
frameworks.authority: BC Ministry of Education and Child Care
frameworks.coding_scheme: Big Ideas / Curricular Competencies / Content — prose, no codes
frameworks.licence: Crown ©; permission required beyond personal/non-commercial (OGL-equivalent status unverified)

frameworks.name: Alberta Programs of Study (new K–6)
frameworks.grade_range: K–12 (new K–6 phased 2022–2025; Gr 7–9 drafts in field-testing)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Outcomes-based: guiding questions → learner/specific outcomes — no cross-subject codes
frameworks.licence: Crown ©; commercial redistribution requires permission (exact terms unverified)

frameworks.name: Québec Education Program (PFEQ)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Competency-based: broad areas of learning + 9 cross-curricular competencies + subject competencies
frameworks.licence: © Gouvernement du Québec; commercial requires permission
frameworks.catalog_notes: Other provinces (MB, SK, NS, NB, NL, PE, territories): own outcomes-based frameworks; Western + Atlantic shared math frameworks; all Crown ©, PDF-only.

frameworks.name: IB Primary Years Programme
frameworks.coding_scheme: Subject continuums by phase (~5) with overall expectations + conceptual understandings + learning outcomes; 6 transdisciplinary themes — no codes
frameworks.current_version: New subject continuums Apr 2025 (replace Scope & Sequence); theme descriptors Dec 2024; schools transition by Sept 2027
frameworks.licence: © IBO — licensing policy explicitly prohibits unlicensed use by app developers / curriculum-mapping platforms; written licence via copyright@ibo.org (may be refused; fees)
frameworks.catalog_notes: Documents via MyIB only. VERIFIED 3/3: do NOT ingest IB objective text without a written IBO licence.

frameworks.name: IB Middle Years Programme
frameworks.coding_scheme: 8 subject groups × assessment criteria A–D; objectives prose in subject guides; ATL skills; 16 key concepts; 6 global contexts

frameworks.name: IB Diploma Programme
frameworks.coding_scheme: Subject guides: aims + assessment objectives (AO1–4) + numbered topics (guide-internal)

frameworks.name: IB Career-related Programme
frameworks.grade_range: Ages 16–19; ≥2 DP courses + career-related study + CP core
frameworks.current_version: Core revision effective 2024 (Reflective Project externally assessed)

frameworks.name: Cambridge Primary + Lower Secondary curriculum frameworks
frameworks.coding_scheme: Coded objectives: 3Nc.01 = Stage 3 + strand N (Number) + sub-strand c + seq .01 (e.g. 7Nf.05 lower secondary); '*' = multi-stage
frameworks.licence: © UCLES; centres may copy internally; commercial third-party reuse requires written permission
frameworks.catalog_notes: Best-coded international programme; PDFs publicly downloadable. VERIFIED 3/3 on permission requirement.

frameworks.name: Cambridge IGCSE / O Level + AS & A Level syllabuses
frameworks.grade_range: Ages 14–16 (70+ IGCSE subjects, 4-digit codes) + 16–19 (~60 AS/A, 9xxx codes)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Assessment objectives (AO1–AO4) + numbered topics; syllabus codes (0580 Maths, 9702 Physics)

frameworks.name: Pearson Edexcel international (iPrimary, iLowerSecondary, International GCSE, IAL)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Spec codes (4MA1, WMA11); AO1–3/4 + numbered units; iPrimary/iLowerSecondary objectives via ActiveLearn (coding unverified)
frameworks.licence: © Pearson; approved-centre internal use only; commercial use needs written permission (copyrightPQS@pearson.com)

frameworks.name: OxfordAQA International GCSEs + International AS/A Level
frameworks.grade_range: Ages 14–19; 40+ IGCSE subjects + full AS/A suite
frameworks.coding_scheme: AO1–3 + numbered sections; spec codes (9630 Physics)

frameworks.name: International Primary Curriculum (+ IEYC, IMYC)
frameworks.authority: Fieldwork Education / International Curriculum Association (Nord Anglia family)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Subject Learning Goals + International Learning Goals + 8 Personal Learning Goals — prose, no codes; ~80+ thematic units
frameworks.current_version: Continuously updated (edition year unverified); 1,000+ schools in 90+ countries
frameworks.licence: © Fieldwork Education Ltd — member-school access only (Members' Lounge)

frameworks.name: AERO (American Education Reaches Out) standards
frameworks.authority: Project AERO / US State Dept Office of Overseas Schools
frameworks.coding_scheme: CCSS-inherited codes for ELA/Math ('Common Core Plus'); science = 2011 framework + NGSS crosswalk
frameworks.current_version: Active (20th Summer Institute Jun 2024); science framework 2011
frameworks.licence: © AERO notices on PDFs (US-government public-domain status unverified)
frameworks.catalog_notes: Free public PDFs; used by American-curriculum international schools.

frameworks.name: French programmes abroad (AEFE network)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Identical to France's national programmes
frameworks.licence: Licence Ouverte / Etalab 2.0 (per éduscol mentions légales; excludes third-party media)

frameworks.name: German Schools Abroad (ZfA) / Deutsches Internationales Abitur (DIA)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Follows associated Bundesland Lehrplan + KMK Bildungsstandards; DIA = 5-exam bilingual Abitur
frameworks.licence: Varies by Bundesland; KMK PDFs free; no open licence

frameworks.name: Advanced Placement Course and Exam Descriptions (College Board)
frameworks.grade_range: High school (ages ~14–19); AP International Diploma recognition
frameworks.coding_scheme: Big Ideas → Enduring Understandings → Learning Objectives → Essential Knowledge, coded (e.g. BIO-1.A.1)
frameworks.current_version: Per-course CED revisions; APID language-proficiency change deadline Sept 2025
frameworks.licence: © College Board; free public PDFs; commercial redistribution requires permission; explicitly NO generative-AI training use
frameworks.catalog_notes: Community CASE mappings exist (Common Standards Project covers AP).

frameworks.name: Adventist Education (NAD) Curriculum Standards
frameworks.authority: North American Division Office of Education, Seventh-day Adventist Church
frameworks.grade_range: PreK–12 (elementary by subject; secondary per course, 30+ courses)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Standards by subject/grade with Adventist worldview lens, incorporating national/state standards content
frameworks.licence: Free PDFs but '© — may not be used without permission' — contact NAD before ingesting
frameworks.catalog_notes: Most complete faith-based standards set found.

frameworks.name: Catholic Curriculum Standards (Cardinal Newman Society)
frameworks.coding_scheme: 3 standard types per discipline (general/intellectual/dispositional); designed to overlay state standards with a Catholic lens
frameworks.licence: Free download (PDF/Word/Excel); no licence terms published — contact before ingesting
frameworks.catalog_notes: US dioceses typically adopt state standards + diocesan religion standards (e.g. Archdioceses of Chicago, LA, Boston) — fragmented, no national Catholic academic standard.

frameworks.name: Lutheran Academic Standards (LCMS)
frameworks.authority: The Lutheran Church—Missouri Synod / Concordia Publishing House
frameworks.current_version: Publication imminent (delivery to CPH May/June 2026 per LCMS Reporter — unverified)

frameworks.name: Core Knowledge Sequence
frameworks.coding_scheme: Detailed per-grade content topics + skills (taggable granularity, no codes)
frameworks.catalog_notes: Whether a school-paid SaaS counts as 'commercial' under NC needs CKF confirmation (info@coreknowledge.org). VERIFIED licence 2/3+terms page.

frameworks.name: Hillsdale K-12 Program Guides + 1776 Curriculum
frameworks.coding_scheme: Program guides = scope & sequence (not coded standards); 1776 Curriculum = full history/civics lessons
frameworks.current_version: 1776 Curriculum free with account (unverified); full curriculum = member-school licence

frameworks.name: Zekelman Standards for Judaic Studies
frameworks.coding_scheme: Grade-by-grade benchmarks for Judaic text skills
frameworks.licence: Free open-access (login removed — per secondary source; direct fetch failed)

frameworks.name: EL Education K-8 Language Arts (open curriculum)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Standards-based learning targets aligned explicitly to CCSS ELA
frameworks.licence: Open source / free for educational use

frameworks.name: ACSI Inspire Accreditation Standards (+ Purposeful Design curriculum)
frameworks.grade_range: School-level (6 domains, 20 standards); PDP curriculum K–8 commercial
frameworks.coding_scheme: School-quality standards — NOT lesson-taggable academic content standards
frameworks.licence: Inspire manual free PDF; PDP curriculum commercial
frameworks.catalog_notes: Pattern for faith/classical networks: most publish accreditation criteria or proprietary scope-&-sequence, not taggable standards. Same classification: ACCS, SCL (classical accreditors), NCEA NSBECS (Catholic school-effectiveness), CISNA/Tarbiyah/ISLA (Islamic — no public standards; Gulf Islamic studies via ministries), Abeka/BJU/ACE/Memoria/Sonlight/Veritas/Classical Conversations (proprietary curricula w/ free scope-&-sequence), AmblesideOnline (free CM schedules), Montessori AMI/AMS (training-embedded albums; age bands), Waldorf AWSNA/SWSF (commercial 'Yellow Book' outline), Reggio Emilia (no standards by design), CSI Bible standards K-8 (purchasable), JTS Tanakh/Rabbinics standards (PD-program-embedded), SABIS (fully proprietary points system).

frameworks.name: Common Core State Standards — English Language Arts/Literacy
frameworks.authority: NGA Center for Best Practices + CCSSO
frameworks.coding_scheme: CCSS.ELA-LITERACY.[strand].[grade].[standard](.[sub]) — e.g. RL.5.3 = Reading: Literature, Grade 5, std 3; anchor standards CCRA.[strand].[n]
frameworks.licence: CCSS Public License: royalty-free copy/publish/distribute/display 'for purposes that support the CCSS Initiative'; mandatory verbatim © notice; no altering
frameworks.licence_notes: Purpose-scoped grant (not blanket CC). Include: '© Copyright 2010. National Governors Association Center for Best Practices and Council of Chief State School Officers. All rights reserved.' Counsel check recommended for commercial-product scope.
frameworks.catalog_notes: Third-party machine-readable via Common Standards Project API + CASE providers.

frameworks.name: Common Core State Standards — Mathematics (Content)
frameworks.grade_range: K–12 (K–8 by grade; HS by conceptual category)
frameworks.coding_scheme: CCSS.MATH.CONTENT.[grade].[domain].[cluster].[n] — e.g. 5.NBT.B.5 = Grade 5, Number & Operations in Base Ten, cluster B, std 5

frameworks.name: CCSS Standards for Mathematical Practice
frameworks.coding_scheme: CCSS.MATH.PRACTICE.MP1–MP8 (8 practices)
frameworks.catalog_notes: The 8 process practices (MP1 'Make sense of problems and persevere…' → MP8). Tag-friendly across every grade.

frameworks.name: Next Generation Science Standards
frameworks.coding_scheme: Performance expectations: [grade]-[discipline][core idea]-[n] — e.g. 5-PS1-1 (Grade 5, Physical Sciences DCI 1, PE 1); 3D structure: SEPs × DCIs × CCCs
frameworks.licence: © Achieve/NGSS Lead States — free use with attribution per NGSS terms of use; trademark rules for 'aligned' claims
frameworks.catalog_notes: ~20 states adopted verbatim + ~24 adapted Framework-based standards (per-state stance in state entries).

frameworks.name: C3 Framework for Social Studies State Standards
frameworks.authority: National Council for the Social Studies (NCSS)
frameworks.coding_scheme: Dimension-coded indicators, e.g. D2.His.1.3-5

frameworks.name: CASEL SEL Framework (5 competencies)
frameworks.authority: Collaborative for Academic, Social, and Emotional Learning
frameworks.coding_scheme: 5 competencies (Self-Awareness, Self-Management, Social Awareness, Relationship Skills, Responsible Decision-Making) — framework, not granular standards
frameworks.catalog_notes: Maps to the app's SEL subject; many states publish their own SEL competencies derived from it.

frameworks.name: WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition
frameworks.coding_scheme: 5 ELD standards × Key Language Uses × proficiency levels (e.g. ELD-SI, ELD-LA)
frameworks.licence: © WIDA; use per WIDA terms (consortium membership for assessments)
frameworks.catalog_notes: De-facto EL framework in 40+ US states and many international schools.

frameworks.name: IB Approaches to Learning (ATL) skills framework
frameworks.coding_scheme: 5 skill categories (Thinking, Communication, Self-management, Research, Social) with sub-skill clusters (e.g. MYP: 10 clusters) — prose, no codes
frameworks.licence: © IBO — same licensing policy as all IB content (written licence required for app use)
frameworks.catalog_notes: App ships CATEGORY-LEVEL reference only (5 categories + cluster names, facts not expression); full descriptor text requires an IBO licence or school-uploaded provenance.

frameworks.name: Alabama Courses of Study
frameworks.catalog_notes: ELA/Math: CCSS-derived revision. Science: Framework-based own. As of 2026-06; via Common Standards Project / CASE where available.

frameworks.name: Alaska Content & Performance Standards
frameworks.catalog_notes: ELA/Math: independent. Science: Framework-based own. As of 2026-06; via Common Standards Project / CASE where available.

frameworks.catalog_notes: ELA/Math: CCSS-derived revision. Science: Framework-based own. As of 2026-06; via Common Standards Project / CASE where available.

frameworks.catalog_notes: ELA/Math: independent. Science: NGSS verbatim. LOW CONFIDENCE: science stance per baseline, not re-verified. As of 2026-06; via Common Standards Project / CASE where available.
